criteria.name: correct_file
criteria.description: Identifies the correct file where VectorCodeError is defined (src/error.rs).

criteria.name: correct_variants
criteria.description: Lists the variants of VectorCodeError (NotInitialized, ProviderMismatch, EmbedderError, RateLimited, OllamaUnavailable, OllamaModelNotFound, ApiKeyMissing, ParseError, Database, Fts5Error, Io, RerankerError, GraphQueryFailed, PathOutsideAnyWorkspace).
criteria.groundTruth: NotInitialized, ProviderMismatch, EmbedderError, RateLimited, OllamaUnavailable, OllamaModelNotFound, ApiKeyMissing, ParseError, Database, Fts5Error, Io, RerankerError, GraphQueryFailed, PathOutsideAnyWorkspace
